description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, dark metal head with a single broad cutting edge and a slightly tapered poll. The blade is mounted onto a straight, cylindrical wooden handle that appears to be made from a dense hardwood, showing a natural brown finish with subtle grain patterns. The head is affixed to the handle using a traditional mounting style, with the metal wrapping securely around the top of the handle. The axe's design is utilitarian, lacking any visible decorative elements or branding, and is suitable for chopping or splitting tasks. The handle is smooth and straight, without any pronounced grip features or curvature, making it easy to wield with one or both hands. No visible markings, engravings, or labels are present on either the blade or the handle.
description: A utilitarian hand axe with a dark metal blade and a straight wooden handle, designed for chopping or splitting tasks. The blade is broad and securely mounted, while the handle is smooth and cylindrical.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the straight wooden handle and the broad, dark metal blade with a single cutting edge.
description_view_1: Edge-on view highlighting the thinness of the blade and the cylindrical shape of the handle, with minimal detail visible on the blade's face.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the blade's profile and the handle's length, similar to view 0 but from the reverse side.
description_view_3: Top-down view showing the circular cross-section of the handle and the attachment point of the blade, with the blade edge barely visible.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical wooden handle, smooth surface, no grip features, round cross-section.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad cutting edge, wedge-shaped, with a slightly tapered poll and no decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the blade wrapped around the top of the handle.
